subject: ASAP: Software Engineer
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Statsportalen, a company in the public sector space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Java
• MySQL
• SQS

Practical details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 12 months
• Location: TBD
• Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
